message:
feat(polyfills): enable native FS operations for binary targets

Native binary mode now has full filesystem capabilities that were
previously limited by WASI stubs:

- Add __edgebox_fs_chmod, chown, symlink, link, readlink, lstat,
  truncate, utimes to native_bindings.zig
- Update fs.js polyfill to detect and use native functions
- lstatSync now properly detects symlinks using fstatat with
  AT_SYMLINK_NOFOLLOW
- statSync now returns actual file mode (not hardcoded values)

Feature support after fix:
| Feature      | Native Binary | WASI        |
|--------------|---------------|-------------|
| chmod/chown  | Full          | No-op       |
| symlink/link | Full          | No-op       |
| lstat        | Full          | Falls back  |
| readlink     | Full          | Returns path|
| truncate     | Full          | read+write  |
